subject: Re: Mr. Epstein - LSJ
body:
I want specifics , I'm not interested in their views.. ask them to confrim in writing the date for completed small office.. no isunderstandings


----- Original Message ----
From: Rich Kahn <rkahn@nysgmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: daschoettle@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, February 1, 2008 3:05:20 PM
Subject: FW: Mr. Epstein - LSJ


Please advise 
 
Rich Kahn
New York Strategy Group LLC
457 Madison Avenue, 4th Floor
New York, NY 10021
tel 212-891-6430
fax 212-750-2408
cell 917-414-7584


 
From: Doug Stine [mailto:doug@molyneuxstudio.com] 
Sent: Friday, February 01, 2008 3:05 PM
To: Rich Kahn
Subject: RE: Mr. Epstein - LSJ
 
Dear Rich
 
I hope you are doing well.
 
Yes, this is accurate but it depends upon keeping payments current
If you are canceling then I will ask for a very specific detailing.  If you are curious then I will ask for a general accounting.  There is a lot of work involved for a specific detailing.  It is my understanding that 1 a to z cabinet is built (full sized sample) but most of the models, molds, moldings have all been drawn and fabricated to complete this 1 cabinet.  Also most of the cabinet structures have been completed.  Please let me know which accounting you would like?
If you are canceling then I will ask for a very specific detailing.  If you are curious then I will ask for a general accounting.  I do know that they completed a full scale sample and the detail shop drawings were completed but would of needed to be revised for the new location.  Please let me know which accounting you would like?
 
Thanks
Doug
 



From: Rich Kahn [mailto:rkahn@nysgmail.com] 
Sent: Friday, February 01, 2008 12:28 PM
To: Doug Stine; dougdstine@aol.com
Cc: daschoettle@yahoo.com
Subject: re: Mr. Epstein - LSJ
 
Can you please help me understand the following:
 
a)      Regarding the Office & Sitting Area Woodworking I am told that it will be 100% complete by March 15, 2008 – Will you please confirm that this is accurate.
b)      Regarding the Library Woodworking I am told that only 1 bookcase has been built.  If Mr. Epstein were to cancel the Library Woodworking how much would he be refunded from the $1,050,000 Euro deposit he made back in December 2006.
c)       Regarding the Pool Woodworking I am told that nothing has yet been completed.  If Mr. Epstein were to cancel the Pool Woodworking how much would he be refunded from the $379,500 Euro deposit he made back in December 2006.
 
Please call me with any questions.
Thank you
 
Rich Kahn
New York Strategy Group LLC
457 Madison Avenue, 4th Floor
New York, NY 10021
tel 212-891-6430
fax 212-750-2408
cell 917-414-7584

I want specifics , I'm not interested in their views.. ask them to confrim in writing the date for completed small office.. no isunderstandings

From: Doug Stine [mailto:doug@molyneuxstudio.com]
Sent: Friday, February 01, 2008 3:05 PM
To: Rich Kahn
Subject: RE: Mr. Epstein - LSJ

 

Dear Rich

 

I hope you are doing well.

 

  1. Yes, this is accurate but it depends upon keeping payments current
  2. If you are canceling then I will ask for a very specific detailing.  If you are curious then I will ask for a general accounting.  There is a lot of work involved for a specific detailing.  It is my understanding that 1 a to z cabinet is built (full sized sample) but most of the models, molds, moldings have all been drawn and fabricated to complete this 1 cabinet.  Also most of the cabinet structures have been completed.  Please let me know which accounting you would like?
  3. If you are canceling then I will ask for a very specific detailing.  If you are curious then I will ask for a general accounting.  I do know that they completed a full scale sample and the detail shop drawings were completed but would of needed to be revised for the new location.  Please let me know which accounting you would like?

 

Thanks

Doug

 

From: Rich Kahn [mailto:rkahn@nysgmail.com]
Sent: Friday, February 01, 2008 12:28 PM
To: Doug Stine; dougdstine@aol.com
Cc: daschoettle@yahoo.com
Subject: re: Mr. Epstein - LSJ

 

Can you please help me understand the following:

 

a)      Regarding the Office & Sitting Area Woodworking I am told that it will be 100% complete by March 15, 2008 – Will you please confirm that this is accurate.

b)      Regarding the Library Woodworking I am told that only 1 bookcase has been built.  If Mr. Epstein were to cancel the Library Woodworking how much would he be refunded from the $1,050,000 Euro deposit he made back in December 2006.

c)       Regarding the Pool Woodworking I am told that nothing has yet been completed.  If Mr. Epstein were to cancel the Pool Woodworking how much would he be refunded from the $379,500 Euro deposit he made back in December 2006.

 

Please call me with any questions.

Thank you

 

Rich Kahn

New York Strategy Group LLC

457 Madison Avenue, 4th Floor

New York, NY 10021

fax 212-750-2408

cell 917-414-7584
